steps.t: Use the Instance Finder to enter 'Sagroth, Lair of Vermin' on any difficulty.
Piles of unidentifiable filth can be found in 'Sagroth, Lair of Vermin.' You should destroy them.
Lágsaith has recounted, in excruciating detail, the disgusting filth she and her comrades encountered while in the sewers. You should tell Avlath in B…
